doctor_ren_chase:idle.greeting: Ren wipes blood off his augmented fingers. "Walker. The clinic's open if you bleed. Talk if you don't."

playerOptions.text: I have a satchel from Pia Thalis.

nodes.npcText: "Set it on the third shelf, behind the gauze. Walk out. Don't say the name again here."
He's already on the next patient.

child_pixel:idle.greeting: Pixel pulls the mirrored visor up halfway. "Walker. Squirrel says you smell like trouble."

playerOptions.text: You have a map. Kira Zane's.

nodes.npcText: She freezes. "Don't tell anyone. Not even Kira. I didn't know what it was. It's yours if you tell me why she gave it to me."
Visor down. She vanishes into the crowd.
